name: QWEST CORP
summary: Qwest Corporation is a digital networking services company providing integrated telecommunications products and services to Business and Mass Markets customers. Its offerings include fiber and copper broadband, ethernet, optical wavelength services, private line, voice services (local, long-distance, TDM), and affiliate telecommunications services. Operating one of the world's most interconnected communications networks, QC serves enterprise clients ranging from small businesses to large corporations, supporting multi-cloud and AI-first environments.

products.name: Fiber Broadband
products.description: High-speed broadband services to residential and small business customers via fiber-based network infrastructure.

products.name: Other Broadband
products.description: Lower-speed broadband services to residential and small business customers using copper-based network infrastructure.

products.name: Optical Services
products.description: High-bandwidth optical wavelength networks providing end-to-end ethernet solutions for cloud access and site connectivity.

products.name: Ethernet Services
products.description: Point-to-point and multi-point networking services for metropolitan and enterprise-class wide area networks, including wireless tower backhaul.

products.name: Private Line
products.description: Dedicated circuits connecting two or more organizational sites for high-speed, secure large data transmission including wireless backhaul.

products.name: Voice Services (Business)
products.description: TDM voice portfolio including PRI, local inbound, switched one-plus, toll free, long distance, and international services.

products.name: Voice and Other (Mass Markets)
products.description: Local and long-distance services, professional services, federal broadband and state support payments, equipment and IT solutions.

products.name: Affiliate Services
products.description: Telecommunication and application services provided to Lumen affiliates mirroring external customer offerings.

partnerships.description: Sold Mass Markets Fiber-to-the-Home business in 11 states to AT&T for gross cash proceeds of $5.75 billion, completed February 2, 2026.
Ultimate parent; maintains cash management, intercompany financing arrangements, and service company affiliates with Qwest Corporation.
